description:
Fix Pagination Information Display on Polish Language Page

Resolve the language inconsistency where pagination information text appears in English on the Polish version of the page.

Requirements:
- Locate the .pagination-info element displaying English text on Polish pages
- Attempt to implement Polish translation for the pagination text
  - Identify the translation system/method used in the application (i18n, language files, etc.)
  - Add Polish translation strings if translation infrastructure exists
  - Ensure dynamic values (page numbers, total counts) are properly interpolated in Polish
- If translation is not feasible or supported:
  - Remove the .pagination-info element entirely from Polish pages
  - Ensure removal doesn't break layout or functionality
  - Verify pagination controls still work correctly without the info text
- Test the solution on Polish language pages to confirm correct display
- Check that the change doesn't affect other language versions (especially English)
